title: EMC Interface
description: Interact with ProjectE using your favorite virtual storage mods
body:
**This is an addon to ProjectE**
It adds a single block: **EMC Interface** You can connect it to many virtual storage mods such as Refined Storage or AE2.
Once connected, you can put and take items using EMC directly from your virtual storage. **If you are using Refined Storage:**
Put an External Storage on the EMC Interface in order to connect it.
**If you are using AE2:**
Put an ME Storage Bus on the EMC Interface in order to connect it. note that you can connect it to other mods as well
